user_prompt: keep the heap prints but remove the new instances of fifos

edit `lib\AudioFifo\AudioFifo.h` so that it needs an explicit call to `begin` in order to actually make the buffer, thus actually resolving this problem instead of leaving that class as a ticking time bomb
change AudioManager to make that call to `.begin` on the fifos
change `test_sdcard` to delegate the initialization of the fifos and the `AudioFileRecorder` to `AudioManager::init()`
agent_reply: Done. I made the FIFO allocation explicit instead of hiding it in static construction.

Changed [AudioFifo.h](/d:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/lib/AudioFifo/AudioFifo.h:37) so the constructor only stores config, and `begin()` does the actual `new (std::nothrow)` buffer allocation. FIFO methods now safely return empty/no-op behavior if someone uses one before `begin()`.

Changed [AudioManager.cpp](/d:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/lib/AudioManager/AudioManager.cpp:448) so `AudioManager::init()` calls `begin()` on all four manager FIFOs, then initializes `AudioFileRecorder` with the file FIFOs.

Changed [test_sdcard.cpp](/d:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/src/tests/test_sdcard.cpp:192) so it delegates FIFO + recorder setup to `AudioManager::init()`, keeps the heap prints, and queues test samples through `AudioManager::bluetoothToFileFifo()` / `micToFileFifo()`.
Verified with `pio run -e m5stack-core2`: build succeeds. There is still the existing packed-member warning in `AudioFileRecorder.cpp`, unrelated to this change.

user_prompt: I want to run `void test_sdcard()` to test performance of the recorder with encryption enabled
make sure everything is wired so that it works with encryption actually built and active
agent_reply: Wired `test_sdcard()` so it should actually test encrypted recorder performance now.
- `setup()` now calls `all_init()` before bring-up tests, so NVS/M5/gui basics exist before `Aegis` and SD setup.
- installs a deterministic test master key only if no key already exists,
- forces `AudioFileRecorder::setPurePcmMode(false)` so it does not bypass encryption.
- `AudioFileRecorder` now includes `Aegis` by relative path so PlatformIO library discovery works.
- `BtHostList.h` and `WifiManager.h` now include `conf.h`, so their security-mode structs match their `.cpp` files.
Build passed. I restored the generated `src/version.c` bump afterward.
